app.title: iCloudPhotonator

{path}

Progress: {imported}/{total} files imported.

Would you like to resume the import?

Would you like to reimport these files?
dialog.permission_message:
iCloudPhotonator needs the Automation permission to send media to Photos.app.

Please allow the app under System Settings → Privacy & Security → Automation to access Photos.app.

Would you like to open System Settings now?
dialog.permission_missing_message:
iCloudPhotonator needs the Automation permission for Photos.

Would you like to open System Settings to grant the permission?
dialog.grant_permission_message:
Please grant the permission in System Settings.

Click OK when you are done.
onboarding.title: Welcome to iCloudPhotonator
onboarding.message:
To import your photos, iCloudPhotonator needs the following permissions:

1️⃣  Automation (Photos App)
     Allows the app to import photos into the Photos app.

2️⃣  Photo Library
     Allows the app to access your photo library.

macOS will ask you for these permissions now.
Please confirm each with "OK".
error.file_too_large: File too large for staging ({size_mb} MB > {max_mb} MB limit)

error.stuck_interrupted: Import was interrupted by app restart
